tools.name: twitter_get_mentions
tools.description: Fetch recent @mentions of the configured Twitter account. Returns unprocessed mentions for review and response.

limit.description: Maximum number of mentions to return (default: 10, max: 100)

since_id.description: Only return mentions newer than this tweet ID

tools.name: twitter_get_conversation
tools.description: Retrieve conversation context for a tweet. Returns parent tweets in the thread for context-aware replies.

tweet_id.description: The tweet ID to get conversation context for

max_depth.description: Maximum number of parent tweets to retrieve (default: 5, max: 10)

tools.name: twitter_classify_mention
tools.description: Classify a mention into response categories: netclaw_request, technical_network, friendly, off_topic, or spam.

tweet_id.description: The mention tweet ID to classify

text.description: The mention text (optional if tweet_id provided)

tools.name: twitter_generate_reply
tools.description: Generate a CCIE-level reply for a mention. Does NOT post - returns draft for human approval.

mention_id.description: The tweet ID being replied to

mention_text.description: The mention text to respond to

conversation_context.description: Array of parent tweet texts for context

user_history.description: Prior interaction history with this user (optional)

tools.name: twitter_reply_to_tweet
tools.description: Post a reply to a specific tweet. REQUIRES human approval before posting (Constitution Principle XIV).

in_reply_to_tweet_id.description: The tweet ID to reply to

text.description: Reply content (max 280 characters, or will be split into thread)

approved.description: Human approval confirmation (MUST be true to post)

tools.name: twitter_mark_processed
tools.description: Mark a mention as processed (skipped or replied). Prevents duplicate handling on next poll.

mention_id.description: The tweet ID to mark as processed

action.description: What was done with the mention

reply_id.description: The reply tweet ID if action was 'replied'

tools.name: twitter_get_user_history
tools.description: Retrieve interaction history with a Twitter user from Memory MCP.
